title: Property Consultant - Synergy Property Development - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Synergy Property Development - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
